scope.target: ENF-001 semantic governance enforcement, published-path disposition, and dedicated PR CI
constraints: Separate governance CI from package candidate ownership
No path removal without migration/downstream evidence
Consume REL validators without owning release mechanics

steps: Create and validate the v0.5 path-disposition artifact
Add governance PR workflow and path filters
Exercise foundation and REL validation commands
execution.last_completed_step: Committed ENF-001 core at 8fc982d. Its committed-tree quick gate passed 27/28 and correctly exposed that portable check-all and shell registry bytes referenced excluded dated workflow evidence. Replaced the direct reference with a stable source-only governance registry and runner; focused source/downstream and workflow contracts pass.
execution.next_action: Commit the portable governance routing correction, rerun packaging upgrade GWT cases 16 and 17 plus the full quick gate against the new commit, then push for hosted evidence.

results.summary: The core implementation is committed; a portable source-registry correction is implemented locally after the first committed-tree gate exposed one package-integrity failure.
results.residual_risk: The corrected immutable tree still needs the two affected packaging upgrade fixtures, aggregate quick gate, and hosted Ubuntu execution; macOS remains unverified.
